summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. Major architectural refactoring of Admin Dashboard into 'Operations Center' with 3 main sections verified. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all new features. Fixed 1 bug: missing 'Check' icon import in Login.js causing OTP flow to crash.

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'Check' icon import from lucide-react causing 'Check is not defined' error when OTP step indicator tried to render checkmark
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'Check' to the lucide-react import statement
bugs_fixed.severity: HIGH - blocked entire OTP registration flow

backend: POST /api/admin/create-user - Create teacher via unified endpoint (200)
POST /api/admin/create-user - Create student via unified endpoint with grade/city fields (200)
POST /api/admin/create-user - Create counsellor via unified endpoint (200)
POST /api/auth/send-otp - Sends OTP to new email (200)
frontend: Login page renders with Login/Register tabs
Google OAuth button visible
Admin login redirects to Operations Center
Operations Center header visible
3 main tabs visible: User Management, Financials, Reports
User Management > Identity Creator sub-tab visible
User Management > Staff & Student Directory sub-tab visible
User Management > Credentials & Access sub-tab visible
Identity Creator: Role selector (Student/Teacher/Counsellor) visible
Identity Creator: Dynamic form fields for student (grade, city, state, etc.)
Identity Creator: Create teacher returns credentials with teacher_code
Staff Directory: Searchable data table with Name/Role/ID/Email/Credits/Status columns
Staff Directory: Inline Block, Delete, Credits actions in each row
Staff Directory: Clicking name opens drill-down drawer with profile
Credentials & Access: Reset password form visible
Credentials & Access: Badge management visible
Financials > Transaction Ledger: Daily revenue view as default
Financials > Transaction Ledger: Role filter toggle (All/Student/Teacher/Counsellor)
Financials > Transaction Ledger: Date range picker visible
Financials > Transaction Ledger: Daily/Detail view toggle
Financials > Proofs tab visible
Reports > Counsellor Tracking with stats cards
Reports > Counsellor Tracking: Daily Stats toggle shows bar chart area
Reports > Class Overview with search and filters
Reports > Complaints list visible
Register tab shows 3-step OTP flow: email -> otp -> details (FIXED)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI features verified working after bug fix)

seed_data_creation: Seeded teacher1@kaimera.com and student1@kaimera.com accounts that were missing from database

features_verified.operations_center_architecture: WORKING - Admin Dashboard refactored to 3-section Operations Center (User Management, Financials, Reports)
features_verified.identity_creator: WORKING - Role selector with dynamic form fields, creates users with credentials returned
features_verified.staff_directory: WORKING - Searchable table with inline Block/Delete/Credits actions, drill-down drawer
features_verified.credentials_access: WORKING - Password reset form and badge management
features_verified.transaction_ledger: WORKING - Daily revenue view, role filter, date range picker, detail view
features_verified.proofs_tab: WORKING - Shows pending proofs with Approve/Reject
features_verified.counsellor_tracking: WORKING - Stats cards with Daily Stats toggle for bar chart
features_verified.otp_send_endpoint: WORKING - POST /api/auth/send-otp sends OTP (stored in MongoDB otp_codes)

mocked_apis.resend_email: OTP emails use Resend API with unverified sender (onboarding@resend.dev). Actual delivery may fail but OTP is stored in MongoDB otp_codes collection for verification.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 major refactoring fully tested. Operations Center architecture working with 3 main tabs and sub-tabs. OTP registration flow fixed (was missing Check icon import). All backend endpoints working. Test accounts teacher1@kaimera.com and student1@kaimera.com were seeded during testing. Unified /admin/create-user endpoint handles all role types. Transaction filtering with daily revenue view working.
